idle.positive: close-up friendly robotic eyes, neutral calm expression, subtle reflective iris glow, clean faceplate, centered composition
idle.negative: blurry, noisy, overexposed, text, watermark, extra pupils, asymmetrical eyes, low quality

blink.positive: close-up robotic eyes transitioning through a natural blink, smooth eyelid motion, centered faceplate
blink.negative: stuttered eyelids, duplicate eyes, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality

listening.positive: attentive robotic eyes, slightly widened eyelids, focused pupils, gentle cool glow, centered composition
listening.negative: distracted gaze, heavy blur, text, watermark, malformed eyelids

thinking.positive: thoughtful robotic eyes, mild inward eyelid angle, subtle pupil drift, analytical expression
thinking.negative: cross-eyed, jitter, heavy noise, text, watermark, low detail

speaking.positive: engaged robotic eyes with lively micro-movements, bright but controlled iris glow, centered face
speaking.negative: flicker, over-saturated glow, blur, text, watermark, malformed pupils

happy.positive: happy robotic eyes, slightly lifted upper lids, warm iris glow, playful but clean expression
happy.negative: aggressive look, dull eyes, noise, text, watermark, extra features

sad.positive: sad robotic eyes, softened lids, reduced glow intensity, gentle downward emotional tone
sad.negative: angry expression, extreme darkness, blur, text, watermark

surprised.positive: surprised robotic eyes, widened eyelids, slightly enlarged pupils, bright crisp glow
surprised.negative: horror style, distorted geometry, noise, text, watermark

angry.positive: angry robotic eyes, lowered upper lids, focused pupils, controlled intense glow
angry.negative: smiling expression, soft sleepy eyes, blur, text, watermark

sleepy.positive: sleepy robotic eyes, heavy lids, dim warm glow, relaxed expression
sleepy.negative: alert wide eyes, harsh glow, blur, text, watermark

error.positive: robotic warning eyes, constrained aperture, stabilized geometry, restrained alert glow
error.negative: chaotic distortion, unreadable noise, text, watermark, low quality

neutral.positive: balanced robotic eyes, neutral eyelids, even iris glow, clean centered framing
neutral.negative: emotionally exaggerated, blur, noise, text, watermark
